full_text:
Jiang Ji (Zitong) 蔣濟 (子通)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiang Ji (蔣濟), styledZitong (子通), was born in Ping’a county in Chu state. Advised against moving the capital when Guan Yu attacked. Helped Sima Yi deal with Cao Shuang. Jiang Ji was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Jiang Ji lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
